title: Design System: Hirslanden — Variant A (Faithful + improvements)

variant.bet: Same IA, every improvements-list item applied, no creative reach — the risk-averse green-light.
variant.motion: static — gentle hover/focus micro-interactions only; NO motion register

display.purpose: Hero headline only; replaces the low-contrast taupe watermark.

shadows.name: card-lift
shadows.purpose: The single soft shadow on elevated white cards over the warm ground.

header.purpose: Wordmark + primary nav (Kliniken/Ärzte/Fachgebiete) + search + utility bar; reachable emergency path.

footer.purpose: Group blurb, social, link mega-menu, prominent emergency 144.

squaredControls.usage: primary buttons, cards, inputs — deliberate contrast with the pill

motifs.warmPhotography: clinician-with-patient human imagery; reused at captured semantic positions

voice.register: formal Swiss-German Sie; reassurance-forward; scale stated as fact
dos: Do address the reader as Sie; reassure before persuading.
Do state scale (16/300/3000) plainly as proof.
Do use sentence-case headings; uppercase only for short eyebrows.
donts: Don't write in all-caps body copy.
Don't use high-pressure conversion verbs ('Jetzt buchen').
Don't fragment CTA vocabulary across five disagreeing labels.

iaPriorities.evidence: pages/home.json#landmarks hero is a search box ('Stichwort...') + quicklink pill row; motifs.patterns includes 'search-first-hero'
palette warm grounds #f7f6f5/#f0efed + warm text #534c46 + clinician-with-patient hero photography
single family Metropolis; single accent #0094d4; rationed saturation

brand_faithful_inversions: #ffffff retained as elevated card ground (existing brand decision; canonical for Hirslanden). The 'no pure white' impeccable rule is inverted per brand-faithful direction.
Color tokens retained in hex format (matches captured surface and Stitch frontmatter convention). OKLCH applies to new authoring; this is inheritance.
Sharp 0px corners retained on cards/inputs/primary buttons (existing brand uses squared corners as a deliberate counterpoint to the 18px pill). The 'modern means rounded' reflex is inverted.
Saturated #0094d4 retained as the primary brand color (canonical voice, --brandColor). The reflex toward tinted-neutral primaries is inverted.
#f43a11 retained as a reserved color for the emergency-144 affordance only. The reflex to spread accent colors across the system is inverted.
divergence.antiToolboxAudit: 1 hit (sticky top navigation) — justified by inherited site convention.
divergence.motionRegister: none — static variant; presales scope is static-only

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The one action color, squared corners.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #0094d4; color: #fff; padding: 12px 28px; border: none; border-radius: 0; font-family: Metropolis, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.02em; transition: background 0.18s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #0083bd; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0094d4; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Quick-link Pill
components.css: .ds-pill { display: inline-block; background: #f7f6f5; color: #534c46; padding: 8px 18px; border-radius: 18px; font-family: Metropolis, sans-serif; font-weight: 400; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.18s ease; } .ds-pill:hover { background: #f0efed; }

components.name: Content Card
components.description: White card, soft single shadow, squared corners.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fff; color: #534c46; padding: 24px; border-radius: 0; box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); font-family: Metropolis, sans-serif; } .ds-card h3 { font-weight: 500; font-size: 1.375rem; line-height: 1.3; margin: 0 0 8px; } .ds-card p { font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.6; margin: 0; }

narrative.overview: Variant A is the brand exactly as it is today, with the obvious fixes applied. It keeps the captured IA and visual DNA and changes only execution quality: a legible hero headline, a real modular type scale, tokenized spacing, consolidated CTA vocabulary.
keyCharacteristics: One accent, one family, gentle micro-interactions only

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: A single brand blue carries every action; ≤ 10% of any viewport.

rules.name: The Reserved-Red Rule
rules.body: #f43a11 is permitted on the 144 emergency affordance and nowhere else.

rules.name: The Modular-Scale Rule
rules.body: Heading sizes follow a single 1.25 ratio; the ad-hoc 42/34/22 set is replaced.

rules.name: The Single-Shadow Rule
rules.body: One shadow value site-wide; no stacked shadows, glow, or inset.

dos: Do keep the captured IA and section sequence intact.
Do set the hero headline in legible #534c46 or white over a controlled scrim.
Do reserve #0094d4 for action and #f43a11 for 144 only.
donts: Don't use gradients, glassmorphism, neon, or stacked shadows.
Don't add scroll choreography, parallax, or any cinematic motion register.
